headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks to Own for Decades and 2 We Avoid
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Akamai Technologies Stock: Is AKAM Outperforming the Technology Sector?
summary: While Akamai Technologies has exceeded the technology sector over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
